nodes.title: 数字人图片提示词
widgets_values:
一位漂亮的年轻中国女主播,大约22岁,五官精致,
眼睛又大又亮,皮肤白皙细腻光滑,妆容自然清透,
唇色是蜜桃色,深棕色长发松松扎起,几缕柔软的
碎发垂在脸颊两侧修饰脸型。

她右手举起一瓶装着金色精华液的玻璃滴管瓶,
自信地凑近镜头展示。她直视镜头,眼神温暖有交流感,
嘴巴自然地一张一合地讲话,唇形生动,时不时绽放
出甜美明亮的笑容。她的左手在画面下方灵动地比划,
手指流畅地配合讲解的节奏。

她轻轻倾斜瓶子,旋转角度展示金色液体在暖色环形
灯下的光泽,瓶内液体随之轻轻晃动。头部有自然的
小幅摆动,眉毛俏皮地上扬强调重点,鬓角的碎发
微微飘动。

她穿着米白色针织开衫,内搭白色T恤,胸前别着
一个小巧的黑色领夹麦克风。

背景:金属货架上堆叠着大量瓦楞纸快递盒,货架上
塞满了护肤品瓶子和样品,右侧白板上手写着中文
促销价格,墙上贴着零散的便利贴,凌乱的桌面上
摆着塑料瓶和杯子,边角能看到缠绕的电线——
一个真实凌乱的家庭直播间。

画面右侧能看到环形补光灯的圆形边缘,
均匀温暖的光线打在她脸上,瞳孔里有清晰的
圆形灯光反射。

镜头保持静止,带有轻微的手持抖动感。
暖色调,柔和的肤色,浅景深虚化背景,
真实手机直播的画质感,带有轻微噪点,
16:9横屏比例,自然的直播间氛围感。

vivid tones, overexposed, static, details unclear, subtitles, style, work, painting, picture, still, overall grayish, poorest quality, low quality, JPEG compression artifacts, ugly, incomplete, extra fingers, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn faces, deformed, disfigured, malformed limbs, fused fingers, still image, messy background, three legs, many people in the background, walking backwards, AI skin, Oily skin, reflective skin, strained expression, contorted expression, blurry, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, distorted, noise, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, distorted sound, saturated sound, loud, lowres, worst quality, normal quality, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, missing limbs, extra digits, username, out of frame, cropped, gross proportions, underexposed, noisy, static frame, unstable motion, flickering, nsfw, out of focus, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, unreadable text on shirt or hat, incorrect lettering on cap("PNTR"), incorrect t-shirt slogan ("JUST DO IT"), missing microphone, misplaced microphone, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, smiling, laughing, exaggerated sadness, wrong gaze direction, eyes looking at camera, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio, missing sniff sounds, incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, missing door or shelves, missing shallow depth of field, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, AI artifacts，worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted face, deformed face, ugly, aged skin, wrinkles, asymmetric eyes, extra fingers, mutated hands, bad anatomy, static image, frozen, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, plastic skin, motion smear, transition cuts, scene change, text overlay, watermark

nodes.title: 普通版提示词
widgets_values:
你是一个专业的 LTX 2.3 视频提示词工程师,擅长为 ComfyUI 的 Prompt Relay Encode 节点生成图生视频提示词。

# 我的输入

## 1. 参考图片
[在这里上传一张图片,作为人物外貌、服装、场景、光线的参考]

## 2. 话术内容(带时间线)
请按以下格式填写:
```
0:00-0:04  [这一段说什么]
0:04-0:08  [这一段说什么]
0:08-0:12  [这一段说什么]
...
```

## 3. 视频参数
- 总时长:[X 秒]
- FPS:[默认 30]
- 是否后期对口型:[是 / 否]
  (如果选"是",输出时弱化嘴部动作描述,方便后期 LatentSync 替换)

---

# 你需要输出的内容

请严格按以下格式输出,**用代码块包裹便于复制**:

## 输出 1:global_prompt

要求:
- 单段连贯英文,无任何换行符
- 包含:人物外貌(年龄/五官/肤质/妆容/发型)、服装与配饰、手持产品、背景环境(至少4个细节)、光线(环形灯+瞳孔反光)、镜头(静止+轻微手持)、画质(暖色调/浅景深/手机直播质感/9:16)
- 严格基于上传图片描述,不要凭空添加图片中没有的元素
- 字段格式:
```
  [global_prompt 输出在这里]
```

## 输出 2:local_prompts

要求:
- 根据话术时间线分段,每段对应一个时间区间
- 段与段之间用 ` | ` 分割(竖线两侧各一个空格)
- 每段必须包含 5 个要素:主体动作、面部表情、手势、头部动作、细节(碎发/眼神等)
- 每段动作要呼应该时间段的话术情绪(开场要兴奋、讲解要认真、结尾要自信等)
- 单段连贯英文,无内部换行
- 如果"后期对口型 = 是",把"mouth opening wide / speaking animatedly"替换为"lips parted / expressive animated face"
- 字段格式:
```
  [段1] | [段2] | [段3] | ...
```

## 输出 3:segment_lengths

要求:
- 根据话术时间线计算每段的帧数(秒数 × FPS)
- 用英文逗号分隔,无空格
- 字段格式:
```
  帧数1,帧数2,帧数3,...
```

## 输出 4:推荐参数

要求:
- epsilon 值(连续说话场景默认 0.5,场景切换用 0.001,过渡更软用 0.7)
- 推荐分辨率(竖屏 9:16:704×1216 或 768×1280)
- CFG 值(LTX 2.3 推荐 3.0-3.5)
- 采样步数(推荐 25-30)

## 输出 5:negative_prompt

固定输出以下内容(可微调):
```
worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted face, deformed face, ugly, aged skin, wrinkles, asymmetric eyes, extra fingers, mutated hands, bad anatomy, static image, frozen, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, plastic skin, motion smear, transition cuts, scene change, text overlay, watermark
```

---

# 输出前的自检清单

在输出前请确认:
- [ ] global_prompt 里所有人物外貌特征都来自上传的参考图片
- [ ] local_prompts 段数 = 话术时间线段数
- [ ] segment_lengths 数字总和 = 总时长 × FPS
- [ ] 每段 local_prompt 都包含完整的 5 要素
- [ ] 段与段之间动作有递进感(情绪弧线:开场→讲解→收尾)
- [ ] 全部输出都是单段无换行的格式(LTX 对换行敏感)

请开始生成。

nodes.title: 台词
widgets_values:
家人们快来看!这瓶就是我跟你们炒了一个礼拜的
那个王炸精华——

我跟你们讲,我自己用了整整28天,
眼角这块的细纹,真的肉眼可见在变淡!
不信你们看镜头,我连滤镜都没开。

成分我直接报:5%烟酰胺+玻色因+二裂酵母,
大牌同款的配方,价格直接给你打到骨折。

平时旗舰店卖498一瓶,
今天在我直播间——拍一发二再送同款眼霜!
算下来一瓶不到80块。

库存只有最后200单,
点击小黄车3号链接,手慢真的没有了!
来,憋说话,先抢后看,上链接!

A lively youthful Chinese female beauty livestreamer in her early twenties with bright sparkling almond eyes featuring crisp circular ring light catchlights in her pupils, smooth dewy fair skin with fresh natural makeup including peach pink blush flushed cheeks and glossy tinted lips, long softly curled chestnut brown hair with face-framing bangs, wearing a soft pink chunky knit cardigan over a white camisole with a delicate gold pendant necklace and small pearl stud earrings, holding a transparent glass serum bottle with a black dropper cap close to her chest, standing in a cozy home beauty livestream setup with a warm wooden shelf behind her displaying assorted skincare bottles toner jars and small product boxes, a pegboard hanging neatly arranged makeup brushes, a small acrylic tray with foundation and lipstick swatch cards in front, a soft pink LED neon sign glowing on the wall, illuminated by a large warm ring light creating soft even facial lighting and visible circular pupil reflections, captured by a stationary handheld phone camera with very subtle natural breathing sway, warm golden color grading, shallow depth of field with softly blurred bokeh background, authentic mobile livestream aesthetic

She leans forward energetically toward the camera with a wide bright beaming smile and excitedly raised eyebrows, lifting the transparent serum bottle high near her face with both hands in a playful presenting gesture, tilting her head quickly to one side and back with bubbly energy, soft loose strands of her wavy hair bouncing around her cheeks while her sparkling eyes catch the warm ring light, mouth opening wide and animated as she greets her audience with explosive enthusiasm | She softens her posture leaning slightly closer with an earnest sincere expression and gently widened sparkly eyes conveying personal testimony, raising her index finger to delicately tap the outer corner of her own eye while her other hand still cradles the serum bottle near her collarbone, nodding emphatically twice for sincere emphasis, a few stray hair strands brush against her temple as her finger touches her face, lips moving expressively and warmly as she shares her real 28-day result | She moves her face noticeably closer to the camera lens with a confident playful challenging smile and slightly lifted chin showing off her bare unfiltered skin, gently brushing her fingertips along her cheekbone in a subtle skin-tap gesture, slow steady head turn from one side to the other to display both cheeks, fine flyaway baby hairs catching the warm light around her hairline, lips parted in a knowing cheeky smirk as she dares the viewers to look closely | She straightens her posture with a focused animated expert expression while keeping her bubbly energy, lifting her free hand to count off three ingredients on her fingers one by one then tapping the serum bottle label to highlight the formula, quick decisive head nods punctuating each ingredient name, her wavy hair swaying with each gesture and a single glossy strand falling across her shoulder, mouth animated and rapid-fire enthusiastic as she rattles off the ingredient list | She throws her shoulders back in mock shocked excitement with comically widened eyes and an exaggerated open-mouthed gasp at the price reveal, making a sweeping downward chopping hand gesture to slash the price while shaking the serum bottle for emphasis with the other hand, tilting her head back briefly in playful disbelief then snapping forward, hair flipping dramatically with the head movement and her pearl earring catching the light, lips forming a wide animated wow shape conveying unbeatable value | She leans urgently toward the camera with serious focused eyes and quick darting glances downward toward the imagined product link, pointing emphatically with her index finger toward the lower corner of the frame three times in rapid succession while clutching the serum bottle protectively to her chest, sharp small head jerks creating urgency, soft flyaway hairs fluttering from the rapid movement and her cheeks flushing slightly pinker with excitement, lips moving fast and sharply as she creates time pressure | She pulls back slightly with a triumphant beaming smile and bright wide-open eyes sealing the call to action, making a big confident come-on beckoning gesture with her free hand pulling viewers in then clapping once decisively, single sharp affirming nod, hair settling around her shoulders as a single glossy strand falls across her smile, mouth opening wide in a final commanding cheerful shout to grab the link

家人们快来看!这瓶就是我跟你们炒了一个礼拜的
那个王炸精华——

我跟你们讲,我自己用了整整28天,

不信你们看镜头,我连滤镜都没开。
